message:
fix: Add reversed()/sorted() type inference and fix bytes() codegen

- Add type inference for reversed() - returns same type as input
  (bytes, list, string preserved through reversed())
- Add type inference for sorted() - returns list of element type
- Fix bytes() codegen to not pass allocator (runtime.builtins.bytes
  only takes 1 argument)

These fixes enable the float test to pass (bytes(reversed(x))
was failing due to incorrect bytes() signature)
